text.title: Serverless Cost Optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Functions deployed with 1024MB default; p95 used 60MB.
antipattern.fix: Run Lambda Power Tuning across the top-10 functions; redeploy at the suggested setting.

antipattern.symptom: Provisioned concurrency = 10 on a function averaging 2 concurrent invocations.
antipattern.root-cause: r2 violated; PC sized for peak weeks ago, never revisited.
antipattern.fix: Switch to auto-scaling PC; set min=2, target utilisation=0.7.

antipattern.symptom: Hot Lambda calls GetItem inside a loop; 1M GetItems / day costs more than Lambda compute.
antipattern.fix: Refactor to BatchGetItem 25 at a time; expect 60-80% reduction in Dynamo read units.

antipattern.symptom: Service growing to 500 RPS still on Lambda; nobody recomputed cost vs Fargate.
antipattern.fix: Compute monthly cost at 500 RPS; if Fargate cheaper, plan migration.
